mean_cn: n.梦想；愿望；理想；  v.梦想；做梦
mean_en: a series of images, events and feelings that happen in your mind while you are asleep; a wish to have or be something, especially one that seems difficult to achieve
sentence: His dream is to become a football player when he grows up.
sentence_trans: 他的梦想是长大后成为一位足球运动员。
